eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Gray, TX; at 04:42 PM ON MAR 9, 2026 Effective until 05:12 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Gray County Emergency Management: A Fire Warning has been issued for this area. There is a dangerous wildfire 5 miles east of Lefors or 14 miles south of Miami. Smoke and fire will present a threat to life and property. Be prepared to evacuate quickly if requested by local officials.
